verification_pattern: test -f build-scripts/audit-exp-tracker-gaps.js && test -f monitor/prompts/reference/expansion-tracker-gap-semantics.md

PROP-053 is approved by operator — implementation gap, not approval gap
findings.impact: Recurring noise in tinker reports. Either the approval was premature, or the implementation step was dropped between approval and self-apply. Operator should either (a) implement the two files, (b) downgrade PROP-053 to design-pending-operator-review, or (c) mark superseded if no longer needed.
findings.operator_action: Decide PROP-053's fate (apply / downgrade / supersede). Recurring 6+ runs suggests something is structurally stuck.

findings.title: Stranded patch sentinel ISS-2094 still untombstoned at 177h (PROP-056 burndown explicitly skipped it)
evidence: monitor/decisions/stranded-patches-2026-05-17T22-20-15Z.json: tombstone_status=(none), iss_ids=[ISS-2094], created_at=2026-05-17T22:20:15Z
ISS-2094 in git open-issues.json: status='pending-human'
PROP-056 apply commit message: 'ISS-2094 reopened separately, skipped' — operator deliberately deferred
Carry-over from 06-55, 06-08, 02-48 runs
findings.impact: Original ISS-2094 patch (generate-html.js mod) was never re-applied via the own-clone-with-direct-push path. The sentinel was preserved (correctly per operator instruction) so the loop is still open; tinker will keep flagging it until the patch lands AND the sentinel is tombstoned.
findings.operator_action: Two-step: (1) re-apply the patch via own-clone-with-direct-push, (2) set tombstone_status='applied' on the sentinel JSON. Both via /tmp/edit-clone + Git Data API push (PROP-050).

resolution.action: Stranded patch Option A applied to build-scripts/generate-html.js + docs/index.html; stranded-patches-2026-05-17T22-20-15Z.json tombstone_status set to applied at 2026-05-25T07:35:00Z. ISS-2094 + ISS-2112 + ISS-708 all closed; closure-ledger appended with closed_by_mechanism=operator-direct.
resolution.note: Resolution committed by operator approximately 1 minute before this tinker report finalized. FND-04 added to addendum for trend integrity; next tinker run will not carry forward.
